title: astragalus micropterus subsp. stenonychioides
intro: Astragalus micropterus subsp. stenonychioides is a subspecies of the Astragalus micropterus plant, commonly known as a type of vetch or milkvetch. This plant is a member of the legume family and is native to certain regions. The medicinal properties of Astragalus micropterus subsp. stenonychioides include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being used in capsule or powder form to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
